# moodle-cli 0.4.1

## Summary

This patch release makes slow Moodle waits visible and removes one duplicate dashboard request from CLI startup.

The CLI still spends most of its time waiting on Moodle network/session checks, but agents no longer sit through a blank terminal and the common `moodle user --json` path avoids one unnecessary `/my/` round trip.

## Fixes

- Added stderr loading hints and periodic heartbeats for slow Moodle commands
- Kept structured stdout clean for `--json` and `--yaml` output
- Reused the authenticated page context from session validation when creating the Moodle client
- Avoided fetching the Moodle dashboard twice during startup

## Validation

Validated with:

- `uv run pytest -q`
- `uv run moodle user --json`
- repeated `moodle user --json` timing checks before and after the startup fix
